import { useState, useMemo } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth'; import ThemeToggle from '../components/ThemeToggle'; import logoImg from '../images/Logo.png'; export default function Navbar() { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isUserDropdownOpen, setIsUserDropdownOpen] = useState(false); const { isAuthenticated, user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const hideExplorePricing = user?.role === 'admin' || user?.role === 'workspace_owner'; const userInitials = useMemo(() => { if (!user?.fullName) return 'WN'; const parts = user.fullName.split(' ').filter(Boolean); if (parts.length === 0) return 'WN'; if (parts.length === 1) return parts[0].slice(0, 2).toUpperCase(); return (parts[0][0] + parts[parts.length - 1][0]).toUpperCase(); }, [user]); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); setIsUserDropdownOpen(false); navigate('/'); }; return (
{}
